title: Dark Bedroom Hosiery Fashion Editorial AI
sourceTitle: Dark Bedroom Hosiery Fashion Editorial AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Dark bedroom fashion editorial portrait of an adult female fashion model with calm elegant presence wearing sheer black hosiery with a subtle back seam and smooth realistic texture. Subject: an adult female fashion model with calm elegant presence sits on the bed in a black top, sheer black hosiery, and black closed-toe heels, looking slightly downward with one hand gently adjusting hair and the other resting naturally. Scene: a quiet dark bedroom with grey bedding and white pillows creates a cool low-saturation private editorial setting with grey bedding, white pillows, wrinkled sheets, and soft window light. Composition: Fixed vertical 9:16 composition with the model placed slightly to the right, body forming a natural diagonal line, legs as the main fashion-detail focus, and clean bedding space on the left. Style: Realistic fashion editorial photography with calm elegant pose, detailed bedding folds, clear hands, natural proportions, realistic hosiery texture, and premium low-key bedroom styling. Color Palette: Fixed cool gray bedding tones, white pillows, all-black wardrobe, soft skin tones, and muted window-light contrast. Lighting: Soft window light with gentle falloff, natural fabric highlights, subtle hosiery reflection, and low-contrast bedroom shadows. Materials: Smooth black hosiery, closed-toe heels, soft wrinkled sheets, ribbed or matte black top fabric, and realistic bedding texture. Signature Elements: sheer black hosiery with a subtle back seam and smooth realistic texture, all-black styling, diagonal seated pose, left-side bedding negative space, cool gray room, and calm editorial gaze. Restrictions: Keep the subject adult, fully styled as fashion editorial, closed-toe shoes structured, anatomy natural, skin realistic, and frame watermark-free.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
